subject: feat(ux): accessibility, mobile UX, and safety improvements
body:
Add focus trap hook and apply to all 4 modals (SaveLoadModal,
TutorialModal, InstallInstructionsModal, KeyboardShortcutsOverlay)
for keyboard/screen-reader accessibility. Improve mobile experience
with canvas-first layout, larger touch targets, responsive preset
grids, safe-area-inset support, and keyboard shortcuts visibility.
Add beforeunload warning, export cancel button, design search,
tab nav height measurement via CSS custom property, canvas cell
overlay keyboard accessibility, and loadDesign bounds validation.

Tags: ux, a11y, mobile, safety
Complexity: 4
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: ux-improvements
Semver: minor
